title: psoralea lanceolata var. stenophylla
intro: Psoralea lanceolata var. stenophylla, also known as Stenophylla or Psoralea, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Psoralea lanceolata var. stenophylla include its ability to act as a photosensitizer and anti-inflammatory agent, as well as its antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve skin health, treat vitiligo and other skin conditions, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through decoctions or infusions, or in the form of an extract, although its safety and efficacy for human consumption have not been extensively studied.
